title: Implement read-replica routing with staleness-aware fallback
author: arnav
description: Routes read queries to the closest healthy read replica with a staleness threshold; falls back to the primary if no replica is fresh enough. Cuts cross-AZ read latency by ~38% for the analytics dashboard service. Includes a per-query staleness annotation so callers can opt into stronger consistency without falling back globally.

title: Postgres logical replication: handle large transaction backlog gracefully
author: arnav
description: When a long-running transaction stalls the WAL sender, replicas would fall behind by 10s of GB and never catch up without manual intervention. Added a backlog-aware throttle on the producer side and a parallel apply path on the consumer that respects ordering within a single relation. Tested at 4× our peak write rate.
